title: Raven Alerts
description: Alert rules for the Raven API. Import into OpenObserve or convert to your alerting tool's format.

alerts.name: high_error_rate
alerts.description: Fires when the 5xx error rate exceeds 5% over a 5-minute window.

payload.text: Raven API error rate > 5% for 5 minutes. Check the API Overview dashboard.

alerts.name: high_p95_latency
alerts.description: Fires when P95 request latency exceeds 2 seconds over a 5-minute window.

payload.text: Raven API P95 latency > 2s for 5 minutes.

alerts.name: chat_completion_failures
alerts.description: Fires when chat completion error rate is high.

payload.text: Chat completion failures detected. Check the Chat Completions dashboard.
